entries.claim: Claude exposes plugin marketplaces, plugin install flows, and startup auto-update semantics for supported marketplace classes.
Codex exposes plugin marketplaces, cache-backed installed bundles, and documented restart plus new-thread expectations for local plugin changes.
Gemini exposes extension install, link, update, and trust-aware management flows with documented restart expectations after management operations.
Cursor exposes MCP installation through project or global config, deeplinks, collection install, extension API registration, and CLI inspection flows.
OpenCode exposes local and npm plugin loading through config and startup-driven installation with documented config precedence and troubleshooting guidance.
